docket_entries.description: (SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR: DIANA THAI CEO FRO VOYAJOY INC., TO APPEAR FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOYAJOY INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-13-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMREN, JACK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOYAJOY INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VOYAJOY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAMREN, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VOYAJOY INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DIANA THAI, CEO. DEFENDANT JACK HAMREN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VOYAJOY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAMREN, JACK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOYAJOY INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMREN, JACK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
